title: IEEPA Refund Support | TDR
description: Recover IEEPA tariff refunds without the manual hassle. We ensure you are all setup for refunds, identify eligible entries, and submit CAPE declarations. Turn a complex refund process into cash back, faster and with no effort.
pageDescription: Recover IEEPA tariff refunds without the manual hassle.<br>We ensure you are all setup for refunds, identify eligible entries, and submit CAPE declarations.<br>Turn a complex refund process into cash back, faster and with no effort.
heroDescription2: And Get Your Money Back Seamlessly.
step1Title: We Get You Set Up on ACE
step1Description: First, we help you create and activate your ACE account. It's a key step to getting your refund claim submitted.
step2Title: We Ensure Everything’s Ready for Refunds
step2Description: Next, we take care of setting up your ACE account properly so that everything is in place for your refund to be processed.
step3Description: Using the information from your ACE account, we identify any potential IEEPA refund opportunities and give you an estimate of what you can expect.
step4Description: Our team ensures your claim is perfectly formatted and includes all the necessary details, so it meets CBP's requirements.
step5Description: Once your claim is approved, we make sure your refund is processed and sent directly to your bank account.
